input_text: The nice Emajogi is 80 kilometers long. A blue square has a hole. The cake was eaten by the child. The hand of a man moved a wheel. The dog chased by the boy escaped. The big animal lifted a stone. Tallinn is in Latvia with a probability 50 percent. Estonia contains Tartu. Elephants, foxes and rabbits are neither birds nor small fish. Mice are afraid of cats. Eve introduced Mary. The ball was kicked by Mike. Muggles can not disappear. The teacher showed the students the map. John is a rabbit. Winona is a sheep. A coffee cup broke. The length of Nile is 10 meters. John is a small fish?
